kw.name: Open web browser by url
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/Users/doppio/Documents/GitHub/assign-automation-mar-2026/testcases/web/browser/traces/temp/e553c8d3-cf3a-416a-9b03-6a1e58e07379"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.gother.online/en-us
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.

kw.doc: ใช้สำหรับเปิด Web browser Arguments: - ${url} (string) ลิ้งของเว็ปที่ต้องการเปิด: https://google.com - ${supported_browser} (string) ระบบ Browser ที่รองรับ: chromium, firefox, webkit - False (bool) เปิด Browser ในโหมดไร้หน้าต่าง (No GUI): True or False

kw.name: Verify system can redirect to landing page
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=button#flight-search-button>>nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=button#signin-and-register-big-button at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=button >> text=Email or Mobile No. at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=button >> text=Email or Mobile No.'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Debug
kw.doc: Open a interactive shell, run any RobotFramework keywords.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

errors.msg: Error in file '/Users/doppio/Documents/GitHub/assign-automation-mar-2026/resources/import.robot' on line 11: Processing variable file '/Users/doppio/Documents/GitHub/assign-automation-mar-2026/resources/translation/mobile/en.yaml' failed: YAML variable file must be a mapping, got string.
